entry.title: New: RES25-074 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE EXECUTION OF A GROUND LEASE WITH KOMOHALE WEST LOCH VENTURE LP, TO DEVELOP AN AFFORDABLE RENTAL HOUSING PROJECT AT 91-1666 RENTON ROAD, ʻEWA BEACH, OAHU, HAWAIʻI 96706, TAX MAP KEY NO: (1) 9-1-122:004.

Authorizing the execution of a ground lease with Komohale West Loch Venture LP, to develop an affordable rental housing project.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
